name: Rolando Rectangular Aluminum Dining Table - Brown - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant, Seats 6

This table has room for six and can add a space for dining or a buffet in your backyard. Made from the highest quality materials to exacting standards, this Christopher Knight Rolando Rectangular Aluminum Dining Table is an item you are sure to adore for years to come. A must have purchase.
